t01.title: Market Tour, Basket Boat & Cooking Class
t01.desc_card: Experience rural Hoi An life and Vietnamese cuisine. Visit the morning market, paddle a basket boat through the water coconut forest, and join a 1.5-hour cooking class with a local chef.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel in Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Market Visit
itinerary.desc: Explore the local market — learn about ingredients for cooking.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Cam Thanh
itinerary.desc: Drive to Cam Thanh Water Coconut Village by van.

itinerary.title: Basket Boat Ride
itinerary.desc: Paddle bamboo basket boats through the lush water coconut forest.

itinerary.title: 1.5-hour Cooking Class
itinerary.desc: Cook Banh Xeo, Pho Bo, Banh Cuon, and Che with a local chef.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Your Meal
itinerary.desc: Taste the dishes you cooked.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel.

t01.notes: Duration: 5 hours. Morning (8:00–13:30) or Afternoon (13:00–18:00). By Hoi An Cooking School.

t02.title: Sidewalk Food Tour of Hoi An
t02.desc_card: Discover Hoi An street food with an English-speaking guide — taste 9 signature dishes at the most beloved local spots. Small group (max 6).

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Meet at your hotel or a designated point.

itinerary.title: Walking Through Old Town
itinerary.desc: Stroll through the atmospheric streets of Hoi An.

itinerary.title: 9 Dishes Tasting
itinerary.desc: Vietnamese Coffee, Banh Mi, Banh Uot, Mi Quang/Cao Lau, Banh Xeo, Grilled Meat, Chicken Rice, Sugarcane Juice, Balut Egg.

itinerary.title: History & Culture
itinerary.desc: Learn about Hoi An history and food culture along the way.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel.

t02.notes: 3–4 hours. Morning (7:00–10:00) or Afternoon (15:30–18:30). Max 6 guests.

t03.title: Buffalo Riding & Basket Boat & Cycling
t03.desc_card: Explore rural Hoi An by bicycle — ride through rice paddies, ride a water buffalo, paddle basket boats, and enjoy a traditional local lunch.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup by Bicycle
itinerary.desc: Cycle from your hotel through the countryside.

itinerary.title: Eco Village
itinerary.desc: Visit the eco village — see rice fields, ride a water buffalo.

itinerary.title: Basket Boat in Coconut Forest
itinerary.desc: Paddle basket boats through the water coconut canals.

itinerary.title: Traditional Lunch/Dinner
itinerary.desc: At a local restaurant. Deep Fried Spring Rolls, Steamed Red Snapper, Banana Salad, Stir Fried Morning Glory, Dessert.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel by bicycle.

t04.title: Basket Boat Ride & Coconut Tour
t04.desc_card: Experience bamboo basket boats on the water coconut canals. Enjoy spinning boats, folk singing, fishing nets, and crab catching. Fun for all ages!

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Driver picks you up at your hotel (available 8:00–16:00 daily).

itinerary.title: Welcome at Dragon Restaurant
itinerary.desc: Greeted at the coconut forest entrance.

itinerary.title: 1 Hour Basket Boat Ride
itinerary.desc: Spinning basket boats, karaoke on water, fishing nets, crab catching.

itinerary.title: Traditional Music Show
itinerary.desc: Enjoy a traditional folk music performance.

itinerary.title: End of Tour
itinerary.desc: Return to the dock and transfer back to hotel.

t05.title: Basket Boat Ride & Vietnamese Food
t05.desc_card: Combine a basket boat ride in the historic water coconut forest with a traditional Vietnamese meal at a local restaurant.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Historic Coconut Forest
itinerary.desc: Transfer to the historic water coconut forest.

itinerary.title: 1 Hour Basket Boat
itinerary.desc: Spinning boats, karaoke, fishing nets, crab catching.

itinerary.title: Vietnamese Lunch/Dinner
itinerary.desc: Steamed Red Snapper, Spring Rolls, Morning Glory, Banana Flower Salad at local restaurant.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel.

t06.title: Lantern Making, Market, Cooking & Basket Boat
t06.desc_card: The most complete Hoi An experience: handmade lantern workshop, market visit, cooking class, and basket boat ride — all in one tour!

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Local Market Visit
itinerary.desc: Explore the market and buy cooking ingredients.

itinerary.title: Basket Boat Ride
itinerary.desc: Paddle through the water coconut forest.

itinerary.title: Cooking Class
itinerary.desc: Cook Pho Bo, Banh Xeo, Banh Cuon, and Che.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Your Meal
itinerary.desc: Taste your handmade dishes.

itinerary.title: Lantern Making Workshop
itinerary.desc: Create your own handmade Hoi An silk lantern to take home.

itinerary.title: Drop-off
itinerary.desc: End at the lantern workshop in the Old Town.

t07.title: Cham Island Snorkeling Daily Tour
t07.desc_card: Explore the stunning biosphere reserve. Includes speedboat, snorkeling at Bai Xep (45 mins), and a fresh seafood BBQ lunch on the island.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel in Hoi An (or Da Nang/Port).

itinerary.title: Speedboat to Cham Island
itinerary.desc: Depart from Cua Dai Port to Cham Island by high-speed boat.

itinerary.title: Bai Lang Visit
itinerary.desc: Ancient Cham Well, Hai Tang Pagoda, and local market.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling
itinerary.desc: Snorkeling at Bai Xep or Hon Dai.

itinerary.title: Lunch
itinerary.desc: Seafood Set Menu Lunch at an island restaurant.

itinerary.title: Beach Relaxation
itinerary.desc: Swimming and resting on the beach.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Return to Hoi An. Hotel drop-off.

t07.notes: Cham Island says NO to plastic bags.

t08.title: Cham Island Handicraft Tour
t08.desc_card: Experience UNESCO-recognized traditional crafts on Cham Island: hammock weaving, fishing net making, Banh It La Gai cake, and visit the Whale Temple.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up in Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Speedboat to Cham Island
itinerary.desc: Depart from Cua Dai.

itinerary.title: Traditional Crafts
itinerary.desc: Weave hammocks with rattan, learn fishing net making with locals.

itinerary.title: Banh It La Gai
itinerary.desc: Learn to make the island's traditional sticky rice cakes.

itinerary.title: Whale Temple
itinerary.desc: Visit the sacred Whale Temple (Lang Ong).

itinerary.title: Snorkeling
itinerary.desc: 45 min snorkeling at Bai Xep / Hon Dai.

itinerary.title: Seafood BBQ Lunch
itinerary.desc: Fresh seafood BBQ.

itinerary.title: Return to Hoi An
itinerary.desc: Speedboat back, transfer to hotel.

t09.title: Cham Island 2 Days 1 Night (Homestay)
t09.desc_card: Stay overnight on Cham Island in a local homestay. Two snorkeling sessions, island exploration, and authentic island dining experience.

itinerary.title: Transfer & Island Tour
itinerary.desc: Hotel pickup, speedboat to island, visit Bai Lang village.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling Session 1
itinerary.desc: Guided snorkeling, lunch, check-in to homestay.

itinerary.title: Free Exploration
itinerary.desc: Free time to explore, dinner at homestay.

itinerary.title: Morning & Snorkeling 2
itinerary.desc: Breakfast at homestay, second snorkeling session (10:00–10:30).

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Lunch, beach time, speedboat back to Hoi An (14:00–14:30).

t10.title: Cham Island Snorkeling Tour
t10.desc_card: Advanced snorkeling at 2 premium spots in Cham Island Marine Park. Includes Vietnamese lunch at Bai Ong and beach swimming.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up in Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Depart Cua Dai Port
itinerary.desc: Speedboat to Cham Island.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling Spot 1
itinerary.desc: First intensive snorkeling session.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling Spot 2
itinerary.desc: Second intensive snorkeling session.

itinerary.title: Lunch
itinerary.desc: Vietnamese Lunch at Bai Ong or Bai Lang, beach swimming & rest.

itinerary.title: Depart Island
itinerary.desc: Leave the island.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel in Hoi An.

t11.title: Cham Island Try Dive Tour (Beginners)
t11.desc_card: Scuba diving for absolute beginners — no certification needed. 1-on-1 instructor, max depth 6–12m. Explore vibrant coral gardens.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up in Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Depart Cua Dai
itinerary.desc: Speedboat to Cham Island.

itinerary.title: Dive Sessions
itinerary.desc: Visit 2 dive spots, minimum 1 hour per spot. 1-to-1 instruction.

itinerary.title: Beach Lunch
itinerary.desc: Lunch at Bai Chong, swimming and relaxation.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Leave Bai Chong.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to Hoi An hotel.

t12.title: Cham Island Fun Dive (Certified Divers)
t12.desc_card: For certified PADI divers. Explore rich marine life: nudibranchs, seahorses, lionfish, and reef sharks. Depth 10–25m.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up in Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Depart Cua Dai
itinerary.desc: Speedboat to Cham Island.

itinerary.title: Fun Dives
itinerary.desc: Visit 2 dive spots, minimum 1 hour per spot at 10-25m depth.

itinerary.title: Lunch at Bai Chong
itinerary.desc: Lunch and beach relaxation.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Leave Bai Chong.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to Hoi An.

t13.title: Walking Underwater at Cham Island
t13.desc_card: Walk on the ocean floor — no swimming or diving skills needed. Wear an air-pumped helmet and stroll among colorful fish and coral.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up in Hoi An, transfer to Cua Dai Port.

itinerary.title: Speedboat to Cham Island
itinerary.desc: 20-minute ride to the island.

itinerary.title: Walking Underwater
itinerary.desc: Walk on the seabed at Bai Nhon with air helmet, followed by free snorkeling.

itinerary.title: Seafood Lunch
itinerary.desc: Fresh seafood lunch at Bai Chong, beach swimming.

itinerary.title: Return to Hoi An
itinerary.desc: Speedboat back, return to hotel.

t14.title: Cam Thanh Village & Basket Boat
t14.desc_card: Navigate the lush coconut waterways in a traditional bamboo basket boat. Experience crab catching and local fishing techniques.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Guide picks you up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Cam Thanh
itinerary.desc: Travel to Cam Thanh Village by boat or vehicle.

itinerary.title: Basket Boat Experience
itinerary.desc: History lesson, fishing nets, boat racing, crab catching.

itinerary.title: Local Lunch/Dinner
itinerary.desc: Visit a local home, welcome drinks, and traditional meal at a local restaurant.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to your hotel.

t15.title: Cam Thanh Cooking Tour
t15.desc_card: Market visit, basket boat ride, and cook 5 traditional Hoi An dishes at Cam Thanh Village.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Market
itinerary.desc: Visit local market to shop for ingredients.

itinerary.title: Cam Thanh Basket Boat
itinerary.desc: Basket boat ride through the coconut forest.

itinerary.title: Cooking Class
itinerary.desc: Cook: Banana Salad, Spring Rolls, Banh Xeo, Pho, Caramelized Fish.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Your Meal
itinerary.desc: Taste your creations + Morning Glory, Rice, Dessert.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to hotel.

t16.title: Hoi An City, Boat & Street Food
t16.desc_card: Discover the ancient town's secrets, enjoy a romantic flower lantern boat ride, and taste famous local specialties like Banh Mi & Cao Lau.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Market
itinerary.desc: Visit the bustling local market.

itinerary.title: Old Town Attractions
itinerary.desc: Fukian Assembly Hall, Ancient Houses (Phung Hung/Tan Ky), Folk Museum.

itinerary.title: Art Show & Japanese Bridge
itinerary.desc: Traditional art performance and 400-year-old Covered Bridge.

itinerary.title: Dinner
itinerary.desc: Dinner (1 dish: Chicken Rice / Cao Lau / Mi Quang).

itinerary.title: Boat Ride & Flower Lantern
itinerary.desc: Romantic boat ride on Hoai River, release a flower lantern.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to hotel.

t17.title: Cam Thanh Coconut – Hoi An City – Flower Lantern
t17.desc_card: The complete experience: water coconut forest in Cam Thanh, Hoi An Ancient Town walking tour, and evening flower lantern boat ride on the river.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up at your hotel.

itinerary.title: Cam Thanh Coconut Forest
itinerary.desc: Basket boat ride through the water coconut channels.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Ancient Town
itinerary.desc: Fukian Hall, ancient houses, Japanese Bridge, museum.

itinerary.title: Dinner
itinerary.desc: Enjoy Hoi An specialty set menu dinner.

itinerary.title: Boat Ride & Flower Lantern
itinerary.desc: Romantic boat ride on Hoai River with flower lantern release.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to hotel.

t18.title: Bicycle Tour: Cam Thanh & Tra Que
t18.desc_card: Cycle through Hoi An countryside — visit Cam Thanh coconut forest and Tra Que organic vegetable village. Includes basket boat, farming, and cooking class.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup by Bicycle
itinerary.desc: Cycle to Cam Thanh Coconut Forest.

itinerary.title: Basket Boat & Fishing
itinerary.desc: Basket boat ride, fishing, local culture experience.

itinerary.title: Cycle to Tra Que
itinerary.desc: Continue cycling to Tra Que Vegetable Village.

itinerary.title: Farming Experience
itinerary.desc: Work with local farmers in the organic garden.

itinerary.title: Cooking Class
itinerary.desc: Cook: Papaya Salad, Banh Xeo, Spring Rolls, Caramelized Fish.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Your Meal
itinerary.desc: Taste your creations.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Cycle back to hotel.

t19.title: Tra Que Cooking Class Tour
t19.desc_card: Cooking class at Tra Que Organic Village — market visit, farming, foot massage, and cook 4 traditional dishes.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Pick up and drive to Hoi An Market.

itinerary.title: Tra Que Village
itinerary.desc: Cycle roughly to Tra Que, explore the organic garden.

itinerary.title: Farming Experience
itinerary.desc: Work with farmers — dig, sow, plant, and harvest.

itinerary.title: Foot Massage
itinerary.desc: Traditional herbal foot massage.

itinerary.title: Cooking Class
itinerary.desc: Cook: Papaya Salad, Banh Xeo, Spring Rolls, Caramelized Fish.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Meal
itinerary.desc: Taste your creations.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to hotel.

t20.title: Lantern Making & Farming at Tra Que Village
t20.desc_card: Cycle through rice paddies to Tra Que Village for farming, then learn traditional Hoi An lantern making and take home your handmade lantern.

itinerary.title: Hotel Pickup
itinerary.desc: Cycle through rice paddies and shrimp ponds.

itinerary.title: Tra Que Village
itinerary.desc: Dig, sow, plant, and harvest vegetables with farmers.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Local Tea
itinerary.desc: Enjoy Tra Que's special herbal tea.

itinerary.title: Lantern Workshop
itinerary.desc: Cycle to workshop, learn lantern craft from artisans.

itinerary.title: Make Your Lantern
itinerary.desc: Create your own handmade silk lantern to take home.

itinerary.title: Local Lunch
itinerary.desc: Traditional lunch included.

itinerary.title: Hotel Drop-off
itinerary.desc: Return to hotel.
